velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Implementing quality assurance checks to enhance reporting consistency
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Multiple rigour signals (QA, documentation, code quality, production reliability) with zero velocity signals.
domain_risk_quote: Converting Finance requirements into technical solutions
domain_risk_reasoning: Finance function at a marketplace affects business decisions without explicit regulatory, compliance, or financial reporting language to indicate high-risk domain work.
data_team_maturity_quote: Architect, build, and maintain efficient and reliable data models and pipelines
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Specific tools mentioned (dbt, BigQuery, Airflow) in context of building and maintaining suggest an established data function actively growing.
jd_authorship_quote: Converting Finance requirements into technical solutions through requirements gathering
jd_authorship_reasoning: Technically specific bullets on Finance translation and production reliability mixed with generic boilerplate on amplifying impact.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Converting Finance requirements into technical solutions through requirements gathering
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: This explicitly identifies Finance as the primary stakeholder being served, reinforced by the job title 'Analytics Engineer, Finance'.
autonomy_level_quote: Converting Finance requirements into technical solutions through requirements gathering
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role receives scoped requirements from Finance stakeholders and executes technical solutions to meet them, rather than setting strategic direction or defining priorities for the analytics function.

ai_role_quote: Architect, build, and maintain efficient and reliable data models and pipelines
ai_role_reasoning: No mention of AI tools, GenAI infrastructure, or AI-first approach; standard data engineering work.
testing_framing_quote: Implementing quality assurance checks to enhance reporting consistency
testing_framing_reasoning: Active ownership verb (implementing) paired with quality practice (assurance checks).
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Architect, build, and maintain efficient and reliable data models and pipelines
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Emphasizes reliability as core concern, reflecting operational stability focus without regulatory or compliance dominance.
